source: RefSeq-derived TP73 DEx2,3Np73 alpha/beta transcript panel from local NCBI GenBank TP73 locus fixture plus local IEGT plasmid evidence
notes: This panel carries two derived, non-accessioned TP73 transcript models requested for RNA-read transcript-catalog review: D_{Ex2,3}Np73alpha and D_{Ex2,3}Np73beta. Each sequence joins the full-length TAp73 5' exon directly to the fourth transcript exon, skipping the second and third transcript exons of the selected full-length RefSeq source transcript. Because the skipped region contains the TAp73 start codon, the CDS spans below refer to the downstream p73-frame ORF starting at cDNA position 154. These records are intended as explicit curated transcript evidence for hashing/preflight/concatemer review, not as hard-coded TP73 behavior in the RNA mapper. The beta record also carries an IEGT plasmid-contained coding cDNA as local construct evidence.

evidence.label: TP73 locus fixture
evidence.description: Local TP73 GenBank fixture test_files/tp73.ncbi.gb, anchored to GRCh38.p14 chromosome 1:3652516..3736201, used as the deterministic source for exon-chain derivation.

evidence.label: DEx2_3Np73alpha
evidence.description: Derived alpha 3' variant from full-length TAp73alpha / RefSeq transcript variant 1 by retaining exon 1 and alpha downstream exons while skipping transcript exons 2 and 3.

evidence.label: DEx2_3Np73beta
evidence.description: Derived beta 3' variant from full-length RefSeq transcript variant 8 by retaining exon 1 and beta-like downstream exons while skipping transcript exons 2 and 3.

evidence.source_type: Local lab plasmid coding cDNA sequence
evidence.label: IEGT plasmid DEx2_3_p73beta coding cDNA
evidence.description: User-supplied coding cDNA from an IEGT plasmid containing D_Ex2/3_p73beta. This is retained as explicit local construct evidence and compared against the RefSeq-derived DEx2_3Np73beta model.

evaluations.title: TP73 DEx2,3Np73 alpha/beta derivation from local RefSeq exon chains
evaluations.method: Parsed test_files/tp73.ncbi.gb, selected full-length TAp73 source transcripts NM_005427.4 and NM_001204184.2, removed transcript exon ranges 29818..29915 and 30545..30665, concatenated the retained genomic ranges in transcript order, and annotated the downstream p73-frame ORF after the skipped TAp73 start-codon region.
evaluations.summary: Both derived transcripts preserve the full-length TAp73 5' UTR exon, skip transcript exons 2 and 3, and retain the alpha or beta-like 3' source transcript chain. The resulting modeled CDS starts at cDNA position 154 and predicts 565 aa for DEx2_3Np73alpha and 428 aa for DEx2_3Np73beta.

rows.summary: DEx2_3Np73alpha is derived from the RefSeq TAp73alpha transcript by joining the first transcript exon to the exon beginning at local TP73 range 55034..55276, then retaining the alpha downstream exon chain.

metrics.value: Downstream p73-frame ORF after skipped exon-2/3 start-codon region

rows.summary: DEx2_3Np73beta is derived from the RefSeq transcript variant 8 beta-like 3' chain by joining the first transcript exon to the exon beginning at local TP73 range 55034..55276, then retaining the beta-like downstream chain.

metrics.value: Downstream p73-frame ORF after skipped exon-2/3 start-codon region

evaluations.title: IEGT plasmid DEx2_3_p73beta coding cDNA compared with the RefSeq-derived beta model
evaluations.method: Aligned the user-supplied IEGT plasmid coding cDNA against the CDS interval of the RefSeq-derived DEx2_3Np73beta sequence stored in data/resources/tp73_delta_ex2_3_refseq_derived_transcripts.fasta.
evaluations.summary: The IEGT plasmid coding cDNA is 1287 bp and predicts the same 428 aa DEx2_3Np73beta protein. It differs from the RefSeq-derived beta CDS by one synonymous base at coding position 306 (ACC -> ACT; Thr102 unchanged).

rows.summary: The plasmid sequence aligns to the modeled DEx2_3Np73beta CDS after the 153 bp retained 5' exon segment and has one silent C-to-T coding difference.

curation.source_label: RefSeq-derived DEx2_3Np73beta model with local IEGT plasmid coding cDNA evidence
curation.public_database_status: non-accessioned local transcript/construct model; public source transcript is used only as derivation anchor
notes: The local plasmid cDNA predicts the same 428 aa protein as the RefSeq-derived beta CDS.
The single coding difference is synonymous: c.306C>T; ACC->ACT; Thr102 unchanged.
